_comment: EDGE CASE: dual_pov_split — this is one of two scene cards covering the same dramatic event. The scene is the same; the focalizer changes. Compare with the companion file dual_pov_split_b.json. Both are valid CAP Narrative Profile. The two cards together demonstrate 'internal_multiple' focalization across a single dramatic event.

canonical_summary.want: alex wants to be heard without having to beg
canonical_summary.delta: Alex does not get what they wanted (to be heard) but achieves something more important: the clarity to act.

observables.target: the full evidence of Morgan's oversight

interpretations.result: Morgan dismisses it without looking up

observables.target: that Morgan will never acknowledge the harm

interpretations.result: Alex stops arguing and makes the decision to leave
